name: moneybit
description: A Cli tool for creating a general ledger from the journal.

scripts.gh-pages: npm run clean && domaindoc build && cp -r media docs/ && gh-pages -d docs
scripts.demo-monthly: node src/cli.js monthly samples/journal.yml 売上 --chart samples/chart.yml
scripts.demo-monthly-ledger: node src/cli.js monthly-ledger samples/journal.yml 売上 --chart samples/chart.yml

author: Yoshiya Hinosawa <stibium121@gmail.com> (https://twitter.com/kt3k)
